headline: Kinder Morgan (KMI) Stock May Be 39% Undervalued After Gas Expansion News
summary: Kinder Morgan stock has delivered a 128.5% total return over the past 5 years, and the current valuation picture is not straightforward. An intrinsic value estimate based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) approach points to meaningful upside, while market-based multiples look closer to fair value. Over 5 years, Kinder Morgan has returned 128.5%, which puts the recent share price in the context of a strong multiyear run that investors now have to reassess against today’s fundamentals. headline: Kinder Morgan, Inc. (KMI) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
summary: Kinder Morgan (KMI) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

headline: Why Investors Should Care About Midstream Classifications
summary: The Energy MLP Classification Standard (EMCS) categorizes energy infrastructure companies based on their primary source of cash flows.
